name: FalkorDBLite
description: FalkorDBLite is an embedded, zero-configuration graph database for Python. It bundles a self-contained Redis server with the FalkorDB graph module, providing Cypher query support entirely in-process. No external server or daemon required -- just pip install and start building graph applications with property graphs, pattern matching, and relationship traversal. Based on redislite from Yahoo, it also exposes Redis key-value operations alongside graph capabilities.
core_strengths: Cypher query language for expressive graph pattern matching
Zero-configuration embedded deployment with no external daemon
Self-contained Redis server with FalkorDB module auto-managed
Supports multiple independent graphs in a single database
best_use_cases: Local development and testing of Cypher graph applications
Graph-based AI memory and knowledge graphs
Agentic AI workflows requiring local graph storage
Quick prototyping of property graph data models
Embedded graph database in Python applications
remarks: FalkorDBLite spawns a Redis server as a sub-process managed by the Python bindings. It requires Python 3.12+. On macOS, the OpenMP runtime (libomp) must be installed via Homebrew. The API is imported from redislite.falkordb_client rather than a top-level falkordblite package. It is a fork of Yahoo's redislite with FalkorDB graph module added.
